claim: A caveated posterior summary exists for the DEU full-objective working-lock production sampler.
basis: Stage 3B-9 readiness passed, Stage 3B-10 wrote the summary, and Stage 3B-11 robustness passed.
required_caveat: This is not a final publication claim and not a model-superiority claim.

claim: The production posterior used the full-objective likelihood set and the guarded working-lock configuration.
basis: Stage 3B-6/3B-7/3B-9 production lineage and Stage 3B-12 external framing preflight.
required_caveat: The statement is scoped to the production YAML and chain family only.

claim: The readiness and robustness gates passed on two production chain files and 4000 combined rows.
required_caveat: This does not by itself establish external model comparison or publication-grade superiority.

claim: The tri-anchor context is retained as a monitoring caveat around the full-objective posterior.
basis: Tri-anchor monitoring passed in Stage 3B readiness and robustness artifacts.
required_caveat: Do not erase the high-l/lowl/full-objective split from the narrative.

claim: TT_lite may be described as diagnostic-only monitoring context, not part of the sampled posterior likelihood.
basis: Stage 3B-12 TT_lite status and Stage 3B-11 TT_lite diagnostic.
required_caveat: Do not claim the production posterior includes TT_lite.

basis: Stage 3B-10 parameter summary reproduced by robustness checks.
required_caveat: Report as chain-summary posterior under the production sampler, not as final external cosmological truth.
